commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Not unto us, O LORD, not unto us, but unto your name give glory, for your mercy, and for your truth's sake. Augustine of Hippo 1. "Not unto us, O Lord, not unto us, but unto Thy Name give the praise" (ver. For that grace of the water that gushed from the rock ("now that rock was Christ" ), was not given on the score of works that had gone before, but of His mercy "that justifieth the ungodly. " For "Christ died for sinners," that men might not seek any glory of their own, but in the Lord's Name.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
